title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Royal Enfield

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Royal Enfield
jsonLd.description:
Royal Enfield is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
